summary: The user is planning a trip to Nashville and is considering staying at Hilton or InterContinental hotels, utilizing a free night's stay and loyalty points, respectively. They have recently traveled to three different hotels and have developed specific preferences regarding hotel amenities, particularly valuing fitness centers and room views.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Nashville and is considering staying at a Hilton hotel to use a free night's stay. The user is also considering staying at an InterContinental hotel since they have accumulated points with the IHG loyalty program. The user has stayed at three different hotels in the past two months: Hyatt Regency in Chicago, Marriott Marquis in New York City, and Fairmont Orchid in Santa Barbara. The user's favorite hotel among the three is the Fairmont Orchid in Santa Barbara. The user has become particular about the fitness center and the view from their room when choosing hotels. The user has been doing a lot of hotel-hopping lately to better understand their preferences in hotel stays.
